message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance, and this conversation is being logged. We are discussing loan account ****4831 with an amount due of 12921. To verify identity, please confirm either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Identity verified. You stated you cannot pay the full amount today. Do you expect any income or a new job within 30 days?
Yes, my salary should be credited within the next 30 days. I had an unexpected family medical expense, so I can make a small payment now and a larger one after my salary comes in.
Understood. I will note that you are dealing with hardship and expect income within 30 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Okay, thank you. Please have them call me with a realistic payment plan—I can make a small payment now and a larger one after my salary is credited.

Based on what you've already shared, there are two policy-approved options for Nira Finance on the current due amount of 12,921:

1. Two-payment plan: a small first payment within 3 days, with the final payment due within 30 days.
2. Reduced closure: 11,371 due in one payment within 7 days.

You said you can make a small payment now and a larger one after salary credit, so the live fit is the two-payment plan. Please reply with the amount you can pay within 3 days and the date within the next 30 days when you can pay the balance. If you want a phone call to finalize it, I can note that preference.
I can pay ₹2,000 within 3 days, and I should be able to clear the remaining balance on 30th of this month after my salary is credited. A call to finalize it would help.

Your proposal fits Nira Finance policy for a 2-payment plan: ₹2,000 within 3 days, with the remaining ₹10,921 due by the 30th of this month. If you want to proceed, reply "I accept" and confirm the 30th as the final payment date. I’ve also noted your request for a call to finalize the arrangement.
I accept, and I confirm the 30th as the final payment date. Please arrange the call to finalize it.

Accepted. Arrangement recorded for Nira Finance loan ****4831: ₹2,000 due within 3 days, and ₹10,921 due on the 30th of this month. Your request for a call to finalize has been noted. Please ensure the first payment is made within the 3-day window to keep the arrangement valid.
